description.ko: 지표면을 덮고 있는 복잡하고 유기적인 패턴을 시각적으로 탐구하며, 건조한 대지와 유동적인 해수 사이의 대비를 강조하는 작품입니다.
description.en: A comprehensive visual study of the intricate and organic patterns covering the Earth's surface, highlighting the contrast between arid lands and fluid waters.

prompt: Macro photography of diverse Earth textures, split screen showing cracked desert mud, swirling deep blue ocean currents, lush green rainforest canopy from above, and jagged volcanic rock, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed geological patterns, 8k resolution, photorealistic, natural earth tones.
